column1: # The CI coverage gate fails a build if any package's coverage drops BELOW
# the integer floor recorded here. This makes the build green on existing
# debt while blocking regressions and ratcheting toward the real goal.
#   - Goal floor for NEW packages (absent from this file) is COVERAGE_FLOOR
#     (75%) — new code is held to the real standard, not grandfathered.
#   - Never LOWER a baseline. When you add tests, RAISE the package's number
#     to lock in the gain (ideally all the way to 75+).
#   - Nothing is excluded from measurement; 0% packages sit here as visible
#     debt, per the no-hide-coverage rule (memory: No sonar exclusions).
# Values are whole percents (current coverage floored), which absorbs minor
# local-vs-CI float jitter. Regenerate the raw numbers with:
